heading: General authority of Secretary of the Interior
label: 373 General authority of Secretary of the Interior
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to perform any and all acts and to make such rules and regulations as may be necessary and proper for the purpose of carrying out the provisions of this Act into full force and effect.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, refers both to act , popularly known as the Reclamation Act, and to act . See Codification note set out below. For classification of act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables. Act , is classified to sections 373, 414, 418, 435 to 437, 440, 443, 464, 465, 469, 471, 472, 475, 477 to 481, 492, 493, 494 to 497, and 499 of this title.June 17, 1902Aug. 13, 1914June 17, 1902Aug. 13, 1914section 371 of this title
